'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=W6cOHT3JERLeJImbMCvesNtg652nB9zHZF54tX3Cw4M-1773638843-1.0.1.1-91BcjJuWIPoundeex6DrwNa5r64H.zAxqX7C8VFXb4k"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
